text: A lively "Cute Pet Gathering" poster set against a blue sky with white clouds and a green grassy. At the center are three adorable pets: a smiling golden retriever with warm golden fur and a happily lolling tongue stands behind; on the left front is a ragdoll cat with sparkling blue eyes, pink blush on its cheeks, and soft, fluffy white fur; on the right is a tabby cat with neat gray stripes, playfully winking one eye and wearing a yellow star decoration on its head. Large black title "Cute Pet Gathering" sits at the top, accompanied by a yellow bubble text "Little Cuties Often Meet"; on the left, white text reads "Lots of Pet Supplies Waiting for You", and next to a pink paw print on the right, it says "Make a Paw Friend".
